name: @aether/infra
description: Aether Mesh Infrastructure layer — provisions the leased 'body' for each tenant: phone (Twilio), email identity (SMTP/IMAP), sandboxed browser (Playwright), and an isolated VM (Docker).
//: Heavy SDKs are loaded dynamically only when the matching INFRA_*_REAL flag is set, so the service runs with zero installed deps in simulated mode. Run `npm install` to enable live integrations.
